evals.prompt: I want to make an Ironsworn character. She's a former soldier who left her war-band after a battle went wrong. I'm thinking something with iron as her highest stat, maybe a sword, and she has a hound. For her background vow, she wants to find the commander who betrayed her unit.
evals.expected_output: A complete character sheet written to the campaign (name, stats with iron=3, assets including Swordmaster and Hound, background vow and inciting incident as progress tracks, character presented with flavor text).

evals.prompt: Just generate me a random Ironsworn character. Surprise me.
evals.expected_output: A complete random character: name from oracle, stats assigned thematically, 3 thematically coherent assets, background vow seeded from Action+Theme oracle, inciting incident, and a character sketch paragraph.

evals.prompt: I want to make a character. I know I want to be some kind of healer or herbalist type — bad at fighting, good at helping people. I'm not sure about the vows yet, can we figure those out together?
evals.expected_output: Guided walkthrough: Herbalist asset selected, stats reflecting non-combat build (high heart/wits, low iron), at least one collaboratively developed vow, graceful handling of the player not knowing vows upfront.
